creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233857
Patch for argp-standalone v2

Use upstreamed variant

net/linknx
net/traff
sysutils/xen-guest-tools

audio/yoshimi
comms/ebusd
comms/telldus-core
comms/tlf
devel/dwarves
devel/elfutils
emulators/hugo
games/3omns
multimedia/libv4l
multimedia/v4l-utils
net/addrwatch
net/glusterfs
net/knxd
security/cvechecker
sysutils/f3
sysutils/fileschanged
sysutils/freeipmi
sysutils/xen-tools
